text.content:
Training is a long-rest activity for characters at level 5 or below. Each character who picks it runs three ability checks using their highest ability modifier against DC 13 (adjusted by comfort when comfort rules are on). Every set pays XP whether it passes or fails.

XP tier slider

Set the reward rate under Module Settings > Ionrift Respite > Configure Activities > Training. Slide to Off to remove the activity from camp. Otherwise snap to one of five tiers:

TierFail (per set)Pass (per set)Best case (3 passes)
Light3 XP10 XP30 XP
Moderate5 XP20 XP60 XP
Standard7 XP30 XP90 XP
Heavy8 XP40 XP120 XP
Intense10 XP50 XP150 XP

Light matches the original default. Higher tiers speed low-level advancement; use sparingly if you want training to feel like a small bump rather than a level engine.

Diminishing returns

Each consecutive long rest spent on Training holds back 5 XP from the total award (same streak flag as before). The streak resets when the character picks a different activity. At extreme streaks the award can reach zero; the activity card will mark training as non-viable for that rest.

Quick Setup

Simple sets Training to Off. Standard and Survival use the Light tier (3 / 10). Change the slider after applying a profile if you want a different rate.
